# minio_iam_policy (Data Source)

Retrieves an existing IAM policy by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "minio_iam_policy" "readonly" {
  name = "readonly"
}

output "policy_json" {
  value = data.minio_iam_policy.readonly.policy
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `policy` (String)
